tools.name: shakewell
tools.description: Measure vibration frequency with your phone — turn the accelerometer into a live seismograph, spectrum analyser and RPM meter. Diagnose a wobbly washing machine, fan or motor; leave with a frequency, a spectrum PNG and a CSV. Nothing is uploaded.
browser_apis: DeviceMotionEvent.requestPermission() (iOS 13+, requested inside a tap, feature-detected)
First-party radix-2 Cooley–Tukey FFT + Hann window + linear resampler (no runtime library)
Per-axis detrend + summed power spectra (avoids the |a| frequency-doubling artefact)
Parabolic sub-bin peak interpolation + integer-harmonic detection
Web Workers (large-CSV parse + full-recording FFT off the main thread)
Canvas 2D (live seismograph, live spectrum, off-screen 1200×675 PNG card)
setInterval render loop (a hidden tab throttles rAF to a halt)
File API + Blob + URL.createObjectURL (CSV in, CSV + PNG out)

tools.name: voxwell
tools.description: Change your voice in your browser — pitch and formants moved independently by a hand-written phase vocoder, live from the microphone or from a file, exported as WAV or MP3. Nothing is uploaded.
browser_apis: AudioWorklet (first-party phase vocoder: 1024-pt Hann STFT at 4× overlap, per-bin true-frequency estimation, spectral-envelope formant warp — no library)
AudioWorklet (second processor capturing raw Float32 PCM)
First-party radix-2 FFT (the worklet must be a single import-free ES module)
getUserMedia (mono, echoCancellation/noiseSuppression/AGC off; permission requested inside a tap)
OfflineAudioContext (file rendered through the identical graph, latency-trimmed)
GainNode with audio-rate gain (true ring modulation, not tremolo)
AnalyserNode + Canvas 2D (scope + level meter, setInterval-driven so a hidden tab can't stall it)

tools.name: meshprep
tools.description: Check a 3D model before you print it — size, volume, holes and non-manifold edges drawn in red on the model itself. Converts STL/OBJ/PLY/3MF. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.
browser_apis: WebGL2 (first-party renderer, no three.js — flat shading from fragment-shader derivatives, no normal buffer; two-sided lighting so inverted-normal meshes stay visible)
Web Workers (parse → analyse → export off the main thread)
First-party format parsers (STL binary/ASCII, OBJ, PLY ASCII/binary both endiannesses, 3MF — a worker has no DOMParser)

tools.name: reactwell
tools.description: Drop a JSX or TSX file and see the React component render instantly — transpiled in your browser with esbuild (WASM) and mounted in a sandboxed iframe. React is bundled locally; nothing is uploaded; works offline.
browser_apis: esbuild-wasm (in-browser JSX/TSX transpile + bundle, worker:false inside our worker)
Import maps + data: URL ES modules (resolve bare specifiers inside the sandbox)
Sandboxed <iframe srcdoc> (allow-scripts only, opaque origin; error boundary)
React 18 UMD (vendored same-origin, no CDN — preview runtime works offline)
postMessage (runtime/compile errors streamed from the frame)
File System Access API (showOpenFilePicker + poll-to-live-watch a file)
Clipboard API + Web Share API (share-by-URL snippet)
Service Worker (PWA; app shell precached, wasm runtime-cached)

tools.name: glyphcut
tools.description: Subset fonts and convert them to WOFF2 in your browser with HarfBuzz compiled to WebAssembly — keep only the characters your site uses. Licensed font files are never uploaded; works offline.
browser_apis: WebAssembly (HarfBuzz hb-subset — harfbuzz-subset.wasm vendored same-origin, hand-written raw bindings)
Web Workers (whole font pipeline; fonts held worker-side for the session)
CSS Font Loading API (FontFace — live specimen rendered from the subsetted output)

tools.name: gridwell
tools.description: Open, query and convert huge CSV files in your browser — millions of rows filtered and exported with a real SQL engine (DuckDB) compiled to WebAssembly. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.
browser_apis: @duckdb/duckdb-wasm (DuckDB analytical SQL engine, eh build — vendored same-origin, no CDN)
WebAssembly (exception-handling build; no cross-origin isolation required)
Web Workers (DuckDB's own worker — all queries off the main thread)
File API + registerFileHandle (BROWSER_FILEREADER ranged reads — file never buffered into JS memory)
Clipboard API (copy cell / SQL, paste-to-ingest CSV)
Service Worker (PWA; network-first shell, runtime-cached WASM)

tools.name: papershot
tools.description: Turn a phone photo of a document into a flat, readable PDF scan — corners found automatically, perspective flattened, shadows removed. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.
browser_apis: First-party computer vision (Scharr gradient, convex hull, max-area quad, 4-point homography, bilinear inverse warp, integral-image adaptive threshold) — no OpenCV
Web Workers (whole CV pipeline; raw RGBA in and out)

tools.name: blurwell
tools.description: Blur faces in photos and video in your browser — automatic on-device face detection plus manual boxes for plates and badges, with the blur burned into the exported pixels. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.
browser_apis: @mediapipe/tasks-vision (BlazeFace FaceDetector, WASM — model + runtime vendored same-origin)

tools.name: vidwell
tools.description: Compress and trim video in your browser — shrink a big MP4/MOV, cap the resolution, cut a clip, export a smaller MP4. Decode → H.264 encode happens on-device via WebCodecs; nothing is uploaded.

tools.name: verisum
tools.description: Compute and verify file checksums (SHA-256, SHA-512, MD5, BLAKE3…) in your browser — stream a file through a WASM hasher and match it against a published checksum. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.

tools.name: provenova
tools.description: The vendor-neutral system of record for quantum computing — capture, reproduce, benchmark, and attest quantum runs across any QPU or vendor.

tools.name: screenwell
tools.description: Record your screen — with mic, system audio and an optional webcam bubble — entirely in your browser. MediaRecorder encodes locally; nothing is uploaded. Works offline.

tools.name: pixpress
tools.description: Compress and convert images to WebP, JPEG, AVIF or PNG in your browser using @jsquash WASM encoders, with a before/after compare slider. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.

tools.name: inkwell
tools.description: Sign and fill PDFs entirely in your browser — draw/type/upload a signature, place text, dates, initials and checkmarks, download a flattened PDF. Nothing is uploaded.

tools.name: pagesmith
tools.description: Merge, split, reorder, rotate and delete PDF pages entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.

tools.name: unheic
tools.description: Convert iPhone HEIC & HEIF photos to JPG, PNG or WebP in your browser with libheif (WASM). No uploads; works offline.

tools.name: tokenpeek
tools.description: Decode, inspect, verify, crack weak HMAC secrets and forge JSON Web Tokens entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.

tools.name: scribewell
tools.description: Transcribe audio & video to text and subtitles (.srt/.vtt) entirely in your browser with OpenAI Whisper. No uploads, no accounts; works offline.

tools.name: gifsmith
tools.description: Turn any video into an animated GIF entirely in your browser. No uploads, no watermark; works offline.

tools.name: zipsafe
tools.description: Create and extract ZIP archives entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.

tools.name: veilpix
tools.description: Hide an AES-256 encrypted message or file inside an ordinary image via LSB steganography, in your browser. No uploads.

tools.name: sealbox
tools.description: Lock any file with a password in your browser using AES-256. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.

tools.name: metascrub
tools.description: Strip hidden metadata (GPS, camera serial, timestamps) from photos losslessly, in your browser. No uploads.

tools.name: bgwipe
tools.description: Erase image backgrounds in your browser with an in-browser ML model (RMBG-1.4). Photos never leave your device.

tools.name: pdf-crush
tools.description: Compress PDFs in your browser using MozJPEG WASM. No uploads, no accounts, no server.

tools.name: dropwell
tools.description: End-to-end encrypted peer-to-peer file sharing in the browser. No backend, no installs.

tools.name: qrforge
tools.description: Generate tracking-free QR codes and scan them, entirely in your browser. No uploads.

tools.name: textlift
tools.description: Extract text from images, screenshots and scanned PDFs entirely in your browser with Tesseract WASM — plain text or searchable PDF out. No uploads; English works offline.

tools.name: clipwell
tools.description: Trim audio into clips and ringtones in your browser — drag across the waveform, fade, normalise, export MP3 or WAV. Nothing is uploaded; works offline.
